message:
feat(startup,session): pre-warm JS extension runtime during startup, V2 sidecar staleness detection, truncate_head byte fix

Pre-warm JS extension runtime:
- main.rs: spawn background task to boot QuickJS runtime (~50-500ms)
  concurrently with auth refresh, model selection, and session creation;
  await the result just before enable_extensions_with_policy()
- agent.rs: enable_extensions_with_policy() now accepts
  pre_warmed: Option<PreWarmedJsRuntime> — if provided, reuses the
  pre-booted manager/runtime/tools instead of creating them inline;
  session, host actions, and message fetchers still set after boot
- sdk.rs: pass None for pre_warmed in SDK's create_agent_session()
  (SDK callers don't need the startup overlap optimization)

V2 sidecar staleness detection:
- session.rs: before attempting V2 sidecar resume, compare mtime of
  source JSONL vs V2 index offsets.jsonl; if JSONL is newer the sidecar
  is stale and we skip straight to full JSONL parse instead of failing
  with a misleading V2 error

truncate_head byte counting fix:
- tools.rs: use peekable iterator to correctly account for trailing
  newlines — previous logic used `i > 0` which miscounted the first
  line's newline contribution; now checks iter.peek().is_some()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
